title: Decisions, Pattern Matching, and Iteration · Program Brief: Python Truth Comparison
summary: Route support requests through priority rules, repeated records, and changed data conditions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python truth comparison increment in a support-request routing engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Predict truth testing, chained comparisons, equality, identity, membership, and Boolean operator results.
Use regular expressions for justified pattern structure while preferring simpler string operations for simple parsing.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
